posts.message:
Mother’s Day flowers are here! 💐🌸

Show Mom some love with fresh bouquets available in 3 sizes:
🌷 Small Hanging Baskets— $20 (first 3 pictures)
💐 Medium Hanging Basket — $22 (4th picture)
🌸 Large Hanging Baskets and Planter (last 3 pictures) — $30

Perfect for moms, grandmas, bonus moms, or anyone who deserves something beautiful this Mother’s Day 💛

⏰These will be our first come first serve tomorrow, starting at 10am! 
📍146 Daley Rd, Dolgeville
As always, message us with any questions!

April showers bring May… you know the deal 😉🌸
Fresh, beautiful blooms are coming your way — just in time for Mother’s Day.
Stay tuned… full details dropping later today 💛

🥚🍳Eggs restocked! Thanks so much for your support! 
Duck eggs (6 pack) $4 or 2 packs for $6 
Chicken eggs $3/doz, $4/18 pack! 

📍955 Thompson Rd, Dolgeville
